case_title: PHIL WALKER VS. BEACON RESIDENTIAL COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BEACON RESIDENTIAL COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-12-2018 - JUDGMENT.
INVALID/RETURNED CHECK REDEEMED FOR TRANSACTION W0617B30S014 FOR SMALL CLAIMS <= 1500

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WALKER, PHIL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BEACON RESIDENTIAL COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION INJUNCTIVE RELIEF SEEKING AN ORDER DECLARING THE BEACON RESIDENTIAL COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION FEE SCHEDULE VOID IS DENIED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WALKER, PHIL AS TO DEFENDANT BEACON RESIDENTIAL COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY WALKER, PHIL AS TO DEFENDANT BEACON RESIDENTIAL COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
INVALID/RETURNED CHECK REDEEMED FOR TRANSACTION W0617B30S015 FOR SERVICE BY MAIL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-24-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-12-2018 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF PHIL WALKER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RESIDENTIAL BEACON COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL ALFARO, AGENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON RECORD. DEFENDANT WISHES TO RETAIN THEIR RIGHT TO SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
